agent_registration.entry_point: Spillover from the nlt-otoi Apache-2.0 relicense (PR #40): publishing otoi@1.1.0 surfaced that toi@1.0.0 shipped to npm without dist/. Joshua authorized fixing and republishing both packages.
known_limitations: cannot complete npm publish: account 2FA requires a maintainer one-time password (EOTP)
no legal interpretation; package-metadata and build changes only
agent_registration.preferred_handoff_format: structured JSON handoff plus concise PR summary
